title: manettia coccinea var. spraguei
intro: Manettia coccinea var. spraguei is a variety of the Manettia coccinea plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the Caribbean and is commonly known as the Jamaican firecracker due to its bright red color. Manettia coccinea var. spraguei has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used to make a poultice for topical application, with potential health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from pain and digestive issues.
